reason: Round 1 GAP-01/GAP-02/GAP-03 fully resolved. GAP-04 partially resolved: FR-19 pipeline now separates escalate+UnifiedResponse from send reply, but slash notation combines two SRS stages into one visible item (9 items shown, notes claim 10 stages). Minor.

gaps.description: FR-19 pipeline description (line 32) uses slash notation 'escalate/construct UnifiedResponse' combining SRS stages 7 (escalation) and 8 (construct UnifiedResponse) into one visible item, yielding 9 visible items while Notes still say 'all 10 stages'. Per SRS line 37, these are distinct pipeline steps.
gaps.recommendation: Replace 'escalate/construct UnifiedResponse' with 'escalate → construct UnifiedResponse' to clearly show both as separate stages, matching the SRS table's 10-stage canonical form.
